message:
Extend design tokens and replace hardcoded values

Add new design tokens to fill gaps in the system:
- Border radius: --tnz-radius-md (8px), --tnz-radius-lg (12px)
- Spacing: --tnz-space-12 (48px)
- Button heights: --tnz-button-height-{xs,s,m,l}
- Control sizes: --tnz-control-size-{sm,md,lg}

Fix token issues and replace hardcoded values across components:
- ReferenceCard: Fix --tnz-color-purple-300 typo, use typography tokens
- InteractiveDocsStructure: Replace RGBA colors with nav hover tokens
- NavbarTopicList: Use spacing tokens for gap and padding
- TenzirFooter: Use --tnz-space-12 for section spacing
- ThemeSelect: Use spacing and typography tokens
- Sidebar: Fix line-height and border-radius token usage

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
